headline: Influencer's 'Candid' Airport Photo Used 47 Takes, Included A Full Outfit Change Mid-Terminal
summary: She made her boyfriend re-film the 'casual' walking shot 23 times for 'lighting purposes.'
fullBody: Lila Flexington posted a 'spontaneous' airport photo with the caption 'wanderlust mode: activated.' What her followers didn't see was the 47 attempts, two outfit changes, and a boyfriend who 'just wanted to find the gate.' 'The natural lighting wasn't natural-ing,' Lila explained. Her boyfriend, Mark Suffering, has started a support group for 'influencer-boyfriends forced to be photographers.' Lila's next post: 'just woke up like this' — taken after 3 hours of hair and makeup.
